title: CHARLETACRAFT XMAS HARDCORE 2024
description: CHARLETACRAFT XMAS HARDCORE 2024 is a Minecraft modpack that delivers an extreme survival experience with a Christmas theme, where players start with only half a heart of maximum health, facing unique challenges in a custom archipelago environment.

# CHARLETACRAFT XMAS HARDCORE 2024

CHARLETACRAFT XMAS HARDCORE 2024 is a Minecraft modpack that delivers an extreme survival experience with a festive twist.

---

Key Features

Hardcore Survival:
Start the game with only half a heart of maximum health, introducing a high level of difficulty and encouraging strategic gameplay and teamwork.

Christmas-Themed Gameplay:
Enjoy a festive atmosphere with holiday-themed decorations, events, and gameplay mechanics that immerse you in the Christmas spirit.

Custom World:
Explore a unique archipelago made up of five islands, each with its own biomes and climates that impact gameplay, from seasonal effects to survival strategies.

Challenging Events:
Face trials like decision-based events that influence your progress, adding unpredictability and replayability.

Curated Mod List:
Featuring a selection of 93 mods, the pack is designed to enrich your Minecraft experience, blending difficulty with festive fun.

---

System Requirements

RAM: 2 GB minimum recommended for optimal performance.

Minecraft Version: Compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1.

Java: Java 17 is required.

---

Dive into this uniquely challenging and festive Minecraft experience and test your survival skills like never before!
